description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house with a complex, multi-sectioned hip roof covered in dark gray shingles. The exterior walls are finished in a muted gray color, accented by white trim around the windows and roof edges. The front facade features a prominent entryway with a small set of steps, a covered porch supported by columns, and a decorative gable above the main door. Multiple rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, providing ample natural light. The house includes a side garage with a driveway and brick accents at the base of the columns. The overall design is modern with traditional influences, suitable for a residential neighborhood.
description: A large, two-story gray house with a complex hip roof, white trim, and a prominent front porch entryway. Features include symmetrical windows, a side garage, and brick-accented columns.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long, uninterrupted gray wall and the full expanse of the dark hip roof.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entryway with steps, covered porch, symmetrical windows, and white trim details.
description_view_2: Rear or side view displaying the extended roofline and the garage section, with minimal window visibility.
description_view_3: Angled view showcasing the front porch, entry steps, garage, and decorative gable above the main door.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with steps, covered porch, columns, and a decorative gable above the entry.
